zh.lifeSummary: 當Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig於大約1012年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 奧索利時，她的父親Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent24歲，母親Dunlaing ÓCaellaig19歲。她於大約1043年與Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1098年在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福格倫達洛享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig于大约1012年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 奧索利时，她的父亲Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent24岁，母亲Dunlaing ÓCaellaig19岁。她于大约1043年与Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1098年在爱尔兰庫迪 維其可洛福格倫達洛享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (western Ashkenazic) and German: habitational name from Bingen in the Rhineland, Germany.
Norwegian: habitational name from a farmstead so named with Old Norse bingr ‘cow stall, field, small farm’.

variants.name: Bing
meanings: English (Kent): habitational name from Byng in Suffolk or a topographic name for someone who lived in a hollow (metaphorical use of Middle English bing ‘coffer, bin’). Alternatively, it may be from the Middle English word bing ‘coffer, bin’ (from Old Norse bingr ‘bed, bolster, heap, stook of corn’). This word is the source of the placename.
Jewish (western Ashkenazic) and Danish: habitational name from Bing, a shortened form of   Bingen  .
Danish: metonymic occupational name, from bing ‘storage bin for grain’, for someone who either made or used such containers.

nameMeanings.name: Tadhg
meanings: Irish: An Irish name signifying poet, philosopher.

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Giolla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Alois, Erwin, Gunter.  Indian Vinay, Krishna, Padma, Prasad, Satyanarayana.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Góla and Polish Gola .
East German: habitational name from any of the places called Gollau, in Lower Saxony, East Prussia, and Bavaria.

variants.name: Gola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amod, Anil, Bharat, Madhu.
Polish: nickname derived from goły ‘naked, bare, or bald’.
Polish; Sorbian (Góla): topographic name from Polish gola, Lower Sorbian góla ‘bare heathland, place without trees’.

en.lifeSummary: When Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig was born about 1012, in Diocese of Ossory, Ireland, her father, Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent, was 24 and her mother, Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, was 19. She married Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland about 1043, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1098, in Glendalough, County Wicklow, Ireland, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig est née environ 1012, à Diocese of Ossory, Irlande, son père, Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland environ 1043, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1098, à Glendalough, County Wicklow, Irlande, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig um 1012 in Diocese of Ossory, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent 24 und ihre Mutter Dunlaing ÓCaellaig 19. Sie hat um 1043 in Irland Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1098 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Glendalough, County Wicklow, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig è nata il circa 1012 nel Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, sua padre, Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland circa 1043, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1098, nel Glendalough, County Wicklow, Irlanda, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigが約1012年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ オソリーで生まれた時，父Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kentは24歳，母Dunlaing ÓCaellaigは19歳であった。約1043年にアイルランドでToirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1098年にアイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウグレンダロウで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(이)가 대략 1012년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 오소리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dunlaing ÓCaellaig(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1043년 아일랜드에서 Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1098년 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 글렌다루그h에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1012–about 1098: tany ho any amin'ny 1012–tany ho any amin'ny 1098

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig nasceu aproximadamente 1012, em Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, seu pai, Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland aproximadamente 1043, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1098, em Glendalough, County Wicklow, Irlanda, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig родилась около 1012 г. в местности диосес оф оссори, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland около 1043 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1098 г. в местности глендалоую, коунти викклоу, Ирландия в возрасте 88 лет.

sm.about 1012–about 1098: e tusa o le 1012–e tusa o le 1098

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig nació aproximadamente 1012, en Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, su papá, Earl Taidg MacGillapatraic of Ossary and Kent, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Dunlaing ÓCaellaig, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland aproximadamente 1043, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1098, en Glendalough, County Wicklow, Irlanda, a la edad de 88 años.
